title: oiiai cat
description:
将猫命名成"oiiai"来使猫旋转
Name the cat "oiiai" to make it spin.
body:
你可以将猫命名成"oiiai"使其旋转，就像"actions & stuff"里一样，适配"Fresh Animations"的所有版本
需要optifine或EMF作为前置，就像Fresh Animations一样

You can name the cat "oiiai" to make it spin, just like in "actions & stuff", and it works with all versions of "Fresh Animations"
Requires OptiFine or EMF as a dependency, just like Fresh Animations
